---
title: "fromIter()"
description: "Emit every value from a synchronous iterable."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Emit every value from a synchronous iterable.

## Import

```ts
import { fromIter } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources/browser";
```

## Signature

```ts
function fromIter(iterable: Iterable<T>): Operator<never, T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `iterable` | `Iterable<T>` | Iterable whose values are emitted in order. |

## Returns

A source operator that emits every iterable value and then COMPLETE.

## Example

```ts
import { fromIter, graph } from "@graphrefly/ts";

const values = graph().initNode(fromIter([1, 2, 3]), []);
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/sources.ts`
